The named spiral galaxies include: Andromeda Galaxy, Black Eye Galaxy, Comet Galaxy, Sculptor Galaxy, Sombrero Galaxy, Sunflower Galaxy, Tadpole Galaxy, Triangulum Galaxy, and Whirlpool Galaxy.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?item ?name WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q2488 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?item rdfs:label ?name .
    FILTER(LANG(?name) = "en")
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?item skos:altLabel ?name .
    FILTER(LANG(?name) = "en")
  }
  FILTER(BOUND(?name))
  FILTER(REGEX(?name , "Sombrero|Whirlpool|Pinwheel|Surfboard|Andromeda|Centaurus|Triangulum|Cartwheel|Black Eye|Sunflower|Cigar|Comet|Butterfly|Antennae|Tadpole|Sculptor|Sailboat" , "i"))
}
LIMIT 15
```

- "embedding": Retrieves items by cosine similarity between their embeddings and the query embedding. The embedding model used depends on the index and may support text, images, or both.
